member.name: T:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.DataFileMeshRepositoryBuilder
member.summary: Creates a mesh repository using a file as a data souce.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.DataFileMeshRepositoryBuilder.RegistrationDetail
member.summary: Accumulates the details for registrations such as type include attributes and assemblies to search.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.DataFileMeshRepositoryBuilder.Directory
member.summary: The directory in which to create the data file. Should not include the filename.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.DataFileMeshRepositoryBuilder.Filename
member.summary: The name of the file to use or create.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.DataFileMeshRepositoryBuilder.UserProfile
member.summary: The profile of the user creating the repository.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.DataFileMeshRepositoryBuilder.#ctor(HularionMesh.User.UserProfile)
member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: The profile of the user creating the repository. Defaults to UserProfile.DefaultUser.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.DataFileMeshRepositoryBuilder.#ctor(System.String,System.String,HularionMesh.User.UserProfile)
member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: The directory in which to create the data file. Should not include the filename.
The name of the file to use or create.
The profile of the user creating the repository. Defaults to UserProfile.DefaultUser.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.DataFileMeshRepositoryBuilder.Build
member.summary: Builds the repository.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.DataFileMeshRepositoryBuilder.CreateRepository``1(System.String,System.String,HularionMesh.User.UserProfile)
member.summary: Creates a MeshRepository using a Postgres store with a standard setup.
member.typeparam: The type of attribute that will cause a class to be added as a domain if that class has the attribute.
member.param: The directory in which the data file will be placed. DOes not include the filename.
The name of the file to create.
The profile of the user creating the repository.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.DataFileMeshRepositoryBuilder.CreateRepository(System.String,System.String,HularionMesh.Repository.AssemblyRegistrationDetail,HularionMesh.User.UserProfile)
member.summary: Creates a MeshRepository using a Postgres store with a standard setup.
member.typeparam: The type of attribute that will cause a class to be added as a domain if that class has the attribute.
member.param: The directory in which the data file will be placed. DOes not include the filename.
The name of the file to create.
The registration detail for the repository.
The profile of the user creating the repository.

member.name: T:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.FileAccessor
member.summary: Manages access to a file.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.FileAccessor.FileWriteCheckInterval
member.summary: The period between write checks in milliseconds. Cannot go below 10ms.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.FileAccessor.FileProvider
member.summary: Set by the caller to provide the file content when saved.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.FileAccessor.CurrentFileStatus
member.summary: Set by the caller to indicate when an update is ready.

member.name: P:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.FileAccessor.ProcessUpdates
member.summary: If true, updates will be processed to the file. Default is false.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.FileAccessor.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: The name of the file to access, including directory path.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.FileAccessor.ReadEntireFile
member.summary: Reads the entire content of the file as a string.

member.name: M:HularionMesh.Connector.HularionDataFile.FileAccessor.WriteEntireFile(System.String)
member.summary: Writes the content to the file.
member.param: The content to write.

member.summary: The key of the domain.

member.summary: The generic arguments for this domain.

member.summary: Static values related to the domain.

member.summary: Describes the current status of a file.

member.summary: True iff the file's source has been updated and needs to be writtern.

member.summary: A representation of a ValueProperty for file storage.

member.summary: The serialized generics.

member.summary: True iff this property is a generic type.

member.summary: True iff this property is a generic parameter.

member.summary: Gets the file content from mesh services.

member.returns: The file content from mesh services.

member.summary: Gets the mesh content from mesh services.
member.param: The underlying memory provider.

member.summary: Flushes the current state of mesh services to a file.

member.summary: Creates the first line of a data file.

The version of the of the make on which the file will be created.

member.summary: Deserialized the file content to a mesh-readable format.
